message.content:
Let me add more comprehensive tracing:

{
  "analysis": "Need to trace open/close as well to understand what file operations are happening around the bad read.",
  "plan": "Add comprehensive syscall tracing and run again.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'PYEOF'
with open('/app/vm.js','r') as f: c=f.read()
# Add open trace
c = c.replace(
    "R[2] = fd;",
    "R[2] = fd; console.error('O fd='+fd+' path='+hp);"
)
# Add close trace  
c = c.replace(
    "FD.delete(a0); R[2] = 0; return;",
    "FD.delete(a0); console.error('C fd='+a0); R[2] = 0; return;"
)
# Fix read trace to also log the first 4 bytes of result
c = c.replace(
    "if(e._traced<20){console.error('R fd='+a0+' p='+e.p+' n='+a2);e._traced++;}",
    "if(e._traced<20){console.error('R fd='+a0+' p='+e.p+' n='+a2+' res='+nn);e._traced++;}"
)
with open('/app/vm.js','w') as f: f.write(c)
print('Added traces')
PYEOF
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "timeout 15 node vm.js > /tmp/trace4.txt 2>&1; grep -aE '^[ROCS] fd=|Z_Malloc' /tmp/trace4.txt | head -30
",
      "duration": 20.0
    }
  ]
}
